message:
feat(ado): add bd ado CLI commands (sync, status, projects)

Wire the ADO tracker package into the bd CLI:
- bd ado sync: bidirectional sync with --dry-run, --pull-only, --push-only
- bd ado status: show configuration and connection status
- bd ado projects: list accessible ADO projects
- Pull filters: --area-path, --iteration-path, --types, --states
- Conflict resolution: --prefer-local, --prefer-ado, --prefer-newer
- Bootstrap: --bootstrap-match, --no-create, --reconcile
- All commands support --json output

Fix: errors.New() → fmt.Errorf(), removed unused errors import.

Co-Authored-By: Harry Miller <harry_miller@trimble.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
